indications.text:
Phenylephrine Hydrochloride Ophthalmic Solution, USP 2.5% and 10% patients with elevated blood pressure [5.3].
is an alpha-1 adrenergic receptor agonist indicated to dilate the pupil [1]. • Rebound miosis has been reported one day after instillation [5.4].
_______________ DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION _...
Phenylephrine Hydrochloride Ophthalmic Solution, USP 2.5% and 10% is indicated to dilate the pupil.
Phenylephrine Hydrochloride Ophthalmic Solution, USP 2.5% and 10% is indicated to dilate the pupil.
